project_name: Texport Overseas - Who We Are Redesign

scale.h1: text-6xl md:text-7xl lg:text-8xl font-bold tracking-tight uppercase
scale.h2: text-4xl md:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-bold tracking-tight uppercase
scale.caption: text-sm font-medium tracking-widest uppercase text-muted-foreground

spacing_layout.container: container mx-auto px-4 md:px-6 lg:px-8 max-w-7xl
spacing_layout.bento_grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-6

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-none px-8 py-4 uppercase tracking-widest text-sm font-bold transition-all duration-300
buttons.outline: border-2 border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary hover:text-primary-foreground rounded-none px-8 py-4 uppercase tracking-widest text-sm font-bold transition-all duration-300

cards.style: bg-card border border-border/40 hover:border-accent/50 transition-colors duration-300 rounded-none p-8

images.style: grayscale hover:grayscale-0 transition-all duration-700 ease-out object-cover

hero.headline: CRAFTING EXCELLENCE IN EVERY STITCH
hero.subheadline: Three decades of vision, commitment, and global recognition. We are Texport Overseas.

strengths.title: Creativity & Design
strengths.desc: Innovation at the core of every pattern.

strengths.title: Multi-Product Capability
strengths.desc: From woven to knits, we cover it all.

divisions.woven: Sophisticated wear for men, women, and children powered by state-of-the-art technology.
divisions.knits: Comfort meets style with our advanced knitting division.

empowerment.headline: EMPOWERING OUR PEOPLE
empowerment.subheadline: We believe a motivated workforce is the heart of our success.

universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for text.
Ensure all text has sufficient contrast.
Use 'Oswald' for all headings to maintain the industrial fashion look.
Use 'Inter' for body text for maximum readability.
Add data-testid to all interactive elements.
Use plenty of negative space (padding-y-20+) between sections.
